3210180.name: Halloween: Trick or Treat 3 Collectors Edition
3210180.description:
Springfield’s most Awesome Halloween Ever!

It’s Springfield’s best Halloween yet! Help carve Pumpkins at Grandma’s then explore Haunted Mansions, Pinecreek’s Pumpkin Trail, ride a Ghost Train & awesome Phantom Express to Spooksville.

Join a Halloween Parade and Fright Night Cruise. Suddenly it’s Halloween and time for nighttime Trick or Treating. Kids get lots of Treats, and a scary Trick or two! They share out their Treats at home then it’s time for bed.

Halloween : Trick or Treat 3 is crammed full of Ghosts & Ghouls, fantabulous Hog scenes and lots of puzzles for players of all ages and guaranteeing hours of fun & enjoyment.

  • Explore a Truly Amazing Haunted Mansion
  • Ride the Sensational Spooksville Express
  • 3 Game Modes, Casual, Challenge, Extreme
  • Great Wallpapers, Music Player, Bonus Puzzles
  • Sensational Trick or Treating in Springfield
  • Stunning Hogs and Superb Mini Puzzles
  • Highly Original Storyline & Photo Album
